messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for a right shoulder MRI for member NH-152318 with rotator cuff pain for three months. Attached: orthopedic physician order and clinical examination notes. Conservative therapy notes are not included with this submission.
